nasb.text: On that day,” declares the Lord, “There will be the sound of a cry from the Fish Gate, A wail from the Second Quarter, And a loud crash from the hills.

esv.text: “On that day,” declares the Lord, “a cry will be heard from the Fish Gate, a wail from the Second Quarter, a loud crash from the hills.

cnv.text: 耶和華說： “到那日， 必有呼叫的聲音從魚門發出來， 必有哀號從新區發出來， 必有崩裂巨響從山間發出來。

ccb.text: 到那日，鱼门必传出哭喊声， 新区必响起哀号声， 山陵必发出崩裂的巨响。 这是耶和华说的。
